title: Brandads 15 AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Assouline × Timothée Chalamet — "L'EDITION" FORMAT: Ultra-Premium Book SMM Poster | 4:5 | Instagram Hero | Behance Front Page Quality CORE STRATEGY: Monolithic book-jacket grids. Bold spine lettering, clean borders, and premium canvas textures.CAMPAIGN: "L'EDITION"MASTER VISUAL: Monolithic bold serif ASSOULINE typography (75% canvas) in deep scarlet. HERO SUBJECT: Timothée Chalamet. Wears a black tailored blazer, gold ring, looking down.POSE: Leaning over a large open travel book on a mahogany table, hand resting on the page. COLOR SYSTEM: Scarlet Red, Monolithic White, Mahogany Brown, Gold.BACKGROUND: Wood-paneled reading room with warm bookshelf backlighting. GRAPHIC SYSTEM: Clean red margins, catalog code tag, technical grid guides. PROMOTIONAL ELEMENTS: ASSOULINE TRAVEL SERIES | LUXURY COVERS | COLLECTION COMPLETETYPOGRAPHY: Top left logo mark | Center giant A S S O U L I N E | Title: L'EDITIONLIGHTING: Single warm overhead spotlight illuminating the book and his hands. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: poster title: "THE NEW SIGNAL". CAMERA: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 85mm Lens, rich paper textures and canvas weave. destination: Riviera Coast. local details: Luxury publishing editorial campaign visual direction. travel mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood.
